workflow_runs.name: Build and Sign APK
workflow_runs.display_title: Build and Sign APK

head_commit.message:
初始化: 语梦 Yu Meng — Live2D × Operit AI 虚拟助手

- Live2DView: OpenGL模型渲染+表情控制+随机动作
- OperitEngine: NLP推理+情感检测+对话生成
- MainActivity: 对话UI+情感→Live2D联动
- GitHub Actions: 云编译签名APK自动发布
- 架构: GLSurfaceView + ExecutorService异步推理
